headline: Ecolab Declares Cash Dividend
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., May 07, 2026--The board of directors of Ecolab Inc. today declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per common share, to be paid July 15, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 16, 2026.
